title: Intense Lemon Malaysian Chicken Noodles
description: A grassy and bouncy Malaysian dish featuring lemon and a mother sauce base, perfect for meal prep and egg free friendly diets.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bruised lemongrass to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Pour the lemon juice and soy sauce into the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes to heat the chicken through.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with sliced scallions and a sprinkle of soy sauce.
